commit.message:
feat(control-plane): implement POST /import/execute endpoint

Add the import execution endpoint that persists discovered tasks to the
database with automatic project/repository scaffolding and dependency
wiring, all in a single atomic transaction.

- POST /import/execute accepts tasks, projectName, and optional repo info
- Find-or-create project by name, repository by name within project
- Dedup via externalRef — skips tasks already imported to the repository
- TaskDependency records wired from externalRef cross-references
- Best-effort dependency resolution (warns on missing refs, doesn't fail)
- Tasks created in BACKLOG status with source 'automated'
- ExecuteRequestDto uses Zod 4 (control-plane version) for type compat
- 10 integration tests with in-memory SQLite covering all acceptance criteria
- Updated controller tests with execute delegation coverage

Closes T116

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(cli): implement factory init interactive command

Add the `factory init` subcommand that registers a project with the
factory through an interactive flow:

- Auto-detects project metadata (name, git remote, branch, owner)
- Prompts for missing values via readline
- Creates Project and Repository records in SQLite
- Optionally discovers and imports tasks from a local directory
- Writes .copilot-factory.json marker file to project root
- Handles Ctrl+C gracefully without partial writes

Restructures cli.ts to support Commander subcommands while preserving
the default server-start behavior.

Closes T143.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix three existing bugs in bioc-run (#23)

* Fix three existing bugs in bioc-run

1. Fix path case inconsistency: Use uppercase R in all volume mount paths
   - Changed /usr/local/lib/r/host-site-library to /usr/local/lib/R/host-site-library
   - Affects reset ownership (-r) and permission-fixing operations
   - Critical on case-sensitive filesystems (Linux)

2. Fix variable name typo: Use HLIBUSER instead of undefined HLIBENV
   - Line 142 was checking wrong variable name
   - Caused R_LIBS_USER to always be appended to .Renviron

3. Fix regex pattern: Remove pipe from character class
   - Changed GITHUB_[P|T].* to GITHUB_[PT].*
   - Inside brackets, pipe is literal, not alternation

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: Marcel Ramos Pérez <LiNk-NY@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: bioc-run
repository.description: Helper script for bioconductor/bioconductor_docker

commit.message:
feat(cli): implement two-phase Ctrl+C shutdown

Add graceful drain on first SIGINT/SIGTERM that polls SQLite for active
worker leases (up to 30s), then flushes tracing and closes the app.
Second SIGINT force-kills tracked child processes and exits immediately.

- Create apps/cli/src/shutdown.ts with countActiveLeases, drain,
  forceKillChildren, setupShutdownHandlers, and childPids export
- Replace inline signal handlers in cli.ts with setupShutdownHandlers()
- Add 22 unit tests covering all exported functions
- Mark T147 as done in backlog

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Potential fix for pull request finding

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(cli): complete factory start command with verbose flag and banner

Add --verbose flag for debug-level startup logging, box-drawing character
banner with project count display, and queryProjectCount() helper that
safely queries the SQLite database via read-only connection.

- Add verbose field to CliOptions and Commander config
- Rewrite printBanner() with Unicode box-drawing chars and dynamic padding
- Add queryProjectCount(dbPath) with defensive error handling
- Add 3 tests for queryProjectCount (missing DB, missing table, populated)
- Update existing tests for verbose option
- Mark T145 as done in backlog

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(cli): implement project metadata auto-detection for factory init

Add detect.ts module with five detection functions used by `factory init`
to minimize interactive prompts:

- detectProjectName: reads package.json name, falls back to dir basename
- detectGitRemoteUrl: runs `git remote get-url origin`
- detectDefaultBranch: parses git symbolic-ref, defaults to "main"
- detectOwner: reads git config user.name, falls back to OS username
- detectAll: aggregates all detections into ProjectMetadata

All functions return null on failure (never throw). 21 tests using real
temp directories and git repos validate all detection paths and fallbacks.

Closes T142.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(control-plane): add POST /import/discover endpoint

Create NestJS ImportModule with discovery endpoint that accepts a local
directory path, auto-detects format (backlog.json vs markdown), runs the
appropriate parser, and returns a preview of discovered tasks without
writing to the database.

- ImportController with POST /import/discover and Swagger docs
- ImportService with format auto-detection and suggested name derivation
- Zod-validated DiscoverRequestDto (path required, pattern optional)
- Controller tests (4) and service tests (7) with FakeFileSystem
- Added JSON parser exports to @factory/infrastructure barrel

Closes T115.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs(backlog): mark T146 done — static serving already implemented by T120

T146 (serve web-ui static files from same server) was already fully
implemented by T120's StaticServeModule in apps/control-plane/src/static-serve/.
All 7 acceptance criteria verified met.

Also fixes T120 status in backlog index (task file was done but index
said pending). Cleans up Ready-Now and P0 Pending lists to reflect
current state, adding newly-unblocked tasks T142, T145, T115.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add email change and bounce-aware verification flow

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Estandarizado de variables de entorno en base de datos

Se estandarizó las variables de entorno en la configuración de la base de datos en postgreSQL para que no haya confusiones en los nombres por default

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Optimización de función util para manejo de imágenes

Se modificó la función reutilizable para manejo de imágenes para renderizado en producción

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(web-ui): add create task dialog to tasks page

Add CreateTaskDialog component with full form validation, cascading
project→repository selection, and all task fields. Wire it to the
existing useCreateTask mutation hook via a 'Create Task' button in
the Tasks page header.

Includes 16 tests covering rendering, validation, submission flow,
error display, cascading selects, and form reset behavior.

Closes T124.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix API session UUID handling in tests

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Condicionar archivos media y estáticos

Se condiciona los archivos estáticos y media para que sea más óptimos en producción

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

chore: eliminar decorador property del método get_full_name del model User

Se elimina el decorador property ya que es método original de AbstractUser

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(infrastructure): add JSON/backlog.json task parser

Implement deterministic JSON task parser for the import pipeline (T114).
Supports two formats:
- backlog.json: structured format with epics/tasks arrays
- flat tasks.json: plain array of ImportedTask objects

Auto-detects format, maps all backlog.json fields to ImportedTask schema,
validates via Zod safeParse, and collects warnings for invalid entries.
Reuses mapTaskType/mapPriority from markdown parser.

30 tests covering all public functions.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

chore: incluir migraciones en control de versiones

Se eliminan las reglas del .gitignore que ignoraban las carpetas 
de migraciones (apps/*/migrations/) para permitir reproducir 
el esquema en otros entornos

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(control-plane): build CLI entry point command (T121)

Extract createApp() from main.ts into bootstrap.ts for reuse by the CLI.
Implement full CLI entry point with:
- Commander arg parsing (--port, --db-path, --no-open, --no-ui)
- Database migrations, tracing init, NestJS app creation
- Static web-UI serving with graceful fallback
- Browser auto-open and SIGINT/SIGTERM shutdown
- 15 unit tests for arg parsing and path resolution

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(cli): implement programmatic Drizzle migration runner

Add runMigrations() utility to apps/cli that runs Drizzle ORM migrations
programmatically against the factory SQLite database. This eliminates the
need for manual pnpm db:migrate — migrations run automatically as part of
factory init and factory start.

Key features:
- Creates DB file and parent directories on first run
- Idempotent: no-op when already up to date
- Reports applied migration count via MigrationResult
- Custom MigrationError with dbPath/migrationsFolder context
- SQLite configured with WAL, busy_timeout, foreign_keys (matching control-plane)
- Always closes DB connection in finally block

Includes 10 unit tests covering first-run, idempotency, error cases,
WAL mode verification, and table creation validation.

Closes T141.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Apply suggestion from @Copilot

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- POST /calls/{call_id}/tracking-link (authenticated, creates/rotates tracking tokens)

commit.message:
feat(control-plane): serve web-ui static files via @fastify/static (T120)

Add StaticServeModule and configureStaticServing() function for optional
single-origin deployment where API and web-ui SPA are served from the
same Fastify instance.

Implementation:
- @fastify/static registered with wildcard:false for reply.sendFile()
- Custom GET /* route serves actual files or falls back to index.html
- Fastify route priority ensures NestJS API routes always win
- Module activated by SERVE_STATIC=true + WEB_UI_DIST env vars
- configureStaticServing() exported for CLI entry point (T121)

Tests: 12 tests covering validation, static serving, SPA fallback,
API route precedence, and edge cases.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(cli): establish global data directory convention (T140)

Add paths module centralizing all path resolution for the factory's
global data directory (~/.copilot-factory/). Exports getFactoryHome(),
getDbPath(), getWorkspacesRoot(), getArtifactsRoot(), getMigrationsDir(),
and ensureFactoryHome() with FACTORY_HOME env var override support.

Includes 10 unit tests, vitest config, and test script for the CLI
workspace.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(infrastructure): implement deterministic markdown task parser

Add markdown task parser for the import pipeline (T113). Parses
directory of markdown task files into ImportManifest using existing
import schemas from T112.

Key features:
- discoverMarkdownTasks() main entry with FileSystem DI
- Metadata table parsing (| Field | Value | format)
- Section extraction (Description, Goal, Scope, etc.)
- Checkbox acceptance criteria extraction
- Dependency ref extraction from markdown links
- ExternalRef extraction from filenames (e.g., T045)
- Index.md parsing for task ordering hints
- Lenient parsing with ParseWarning collection
- Zod validation via ImportedTaskSchema

68 comprehensive tests covering all public functions and edge cases.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

test(control-plane): add end-to-end dispatch integration test (T138)

Proves full task lifecycle BACKLOG → READY → ASSIGNED → dispatch →
IN_DEVELOPMENT → DEV_COMPLETE through the automation/dispatch pipeline
using FakeRunnerAdapter and FakeWorkspaceManager.

Verifies dispatch job completion, worker creation, heartbeat forwarding
(lease STARTING → RUNNING → COMPLETING), and task state transitions.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Ignore unmet groups in recency checks

Fixes #43

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(control-plane): wire WorkerDispatchService into AutomationService

Wire the full worker dispatch chain into AutomationService so each
automation cycle attempts to process pending WORKER_DISPATCH jobs.

- Add createWorkerSupervisorUnitOfWork and createHeartbeatUnitOfWork
  factory functions in application-adapters.ts
- Instantiate HeartbeatService, HeartbeatForwarderAdapter,
  InfrastructureAdapters, WorkerSupervisorService, and
  WorkerDispatchService in the AutomationService constructor
- Add processWorkerDispatches() fire-and-forget method to runCycle()
- Track active dispatch promises to prevent unbounded concurrency
- Add 10 new tests covering UoW factories and dispatch integration

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Deprecate superseded AI-derived and experimental surfaces (#36)

* Initial plan

* feat: deprecate superseded experimental surfaces with explicit classification and retirement plan

Co-authored-by: cscheib <5832925+cscheib@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: cscheib <5832925+cscheib@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(infrastructure): wire workspace, runtime, and packet adapters into control-plane

Create adapter bridges in apps/control-plane/src/automation/ that wrap
WorkspaceManager, WorkspacePacketMounter, and CopilotCliAdapter from
@factory/infrastructure into WorkspaceProviderPort, PacketMounterPort,
and RuntimeAdapterPort application-layer port interfaces.

- createWorkspaceProviderAdapter: maps positional params to options objects
- createPacketMounterAdapter: delegates and discards MountPacketsResult
- createRuntimeAdapterBridge: bridges SupervisorRunContext/RunContext types
- createInfrastructureAdapters: top-level factory with env config support
- resolveInfrastructureConfig: reads WORKSPACES_ROOT with defaults
- 17 unit tests covering all adapter bridges and config resolution

Closes T136.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(control-plane): implement HeartbeatForwarderPort adapter (T135)

Add heartbeat-forwarder-adapter in apps/control-plane/src/automation/
that bridges WorkerSupervisor heartbeat events to the HeartbeatService.

- Factory function createHeartbeatForwarderAdapter() implementing HeartbeatForwarderPort
- Maps forwardHeartbeat(leaseId, workerId, isTerminal) to receiveHeartbeat()
- Errors caught and logged (never propagated to worker process)
- 7 unit tests covering forwarding, error handling, and resilience
- Update backlog: T132/T135 done, E009 progress 7/13

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(control-plane): wire WorkerDispatch unit-of-work adapter

Add createWorkerDispatchUnitOfWork() factory to application-adapters.ts,
bridging infrastructure database repositories to the WorkerDispatchUnitOfWork
port from @factory/application. Enables WorkerDispatchService to resolve
spawn context (task packet, timeout settings, workspace paths, policy
snapshot) for tasks prior to worker creation.

- Read-only adapter pattern (no write transaction needed)
- resolveSpawnContext returns null for missing/terminal tasks
- Task type to packet type mapping for all task types
- 17 unit tests covering all paths and edge cases
- Closes T134

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add Farcaster hub client, API routes, and mobile web client (#11)

commit.message:
ci: fix release workflow — handle no existing tags

* feat(db): add Prisma schema with User, Profile, Document, NDA models

- User model with role (CREATIVE/COMPANY) and plan enum
- ProfileCreative: fullName, birthDate, birthPlace, codiceFiscale, partitaIva
- ProfileCompany: ragioneSociale, formaGiuridica, sede, SDI, referente
- Document: file metadata + SHA-256 hash for IP timestamping
- NdaAgreement + NdaClause + NdaAgreementClause junction table
- prisma.config.ts for datasource configuration

* chore: update dependencies and config for MVP stack

- Add tRPC, @tanstack/react-query, NextAuth, Prisma, bcryptjs, zod
- Add Shadcn/ui, lucide-react, class-variance-authority
- Update .gitignore for generated prisma client
- Add Shadcn components.json config

* feat(api): add tRPC routers, NextAuth config, and Prisma client

- tRPC context with session + prisma, public + protected procedures
- Auth router: 7 multi-step signup procedures + me query
- Document router: create, list, getById with SHA-256 hash
- NDA router: create, list, getById, accept (clickwrap with IP logging)
- NextAuth credentials provider with JWT strategy
- Prisma client singleton with pg adapter
- TypeScript augmentations for next-auth session types

* feat(api): add NextAuth and tRPC API route handlers

- /api/auth/[...nextauth] — NextAuth handler
- /api/trpc/[trpc] — tRPC fetch adapter handler

* feat(ui): add Shadcn/ui components and SessionProvider

- Accordion, Badge, Button, Card, Checkbox, Input, Label, Separator, Tabs
- NextAuth SessionProvider wrapper for client components

* feat(auth): implement multi-step signup and login flow

- Splash page with rainbow gradient logo + auto-redirect
- Login page: email/password + SPID/CIE layout buttons (disabled)
- Profile selection: Creativo (yellow) / Azienda (blue) cards
- Multi-step signup wizard with progress bar (6 steps creative, 7 company)
- StepSignup, StepPersonalInfo, StepCompanyInfo, StepCompanyReferent
- StepPhone, StepOTP (mock: accepts 123456), StepPlan

* feat(dashboard): add home feed, NDA creation, and document upload

- Home feed with FeedCard component (preview, title, type badge, SHA hash)
- FilterMenu with type filter (Timestamp/NDA/Contract) and sort
- Tabs (Tutti/Inviati/Non inviati) and FAB button
- NDA creation form: title, description, duration selector, clause checklist
- Document upload: drag & drop, client-side SHA-256 hash, title input

* feat(layout): dark mode root layout with TRPCProvider

- Dark mode HTML class + Inter/Geist fonts
- TRPCProvider + SessionProvider wrappers
- Shadcn/ui CSS design tokens (dark theme)
- Splash page with rainbow gradient logo

* chore(docker): add multi-stage Dockerfile and compose

- Multi-stage build: deps → build (prisma generate) → production runner
- docker-compose.yml: PostgreSQL 16 + app with health checks
- .dockerignore for optimized build context
- Enable standalone output in next.config.ts

* docs: update README and AGENTS, refresh .gitignore

* fix: code review — type safety, route protection, remove starter assets

- NdaStatus enum in schema; add recipientId index
- protectedProcedure narrows session to non-null
- Remove OTP fallback hardcode (throws BAD_REQUEST if no OTP)
- Remove unused name state in StepSignup
- FeedCard: replace manual DocItem with inferRouterOutputs
- nda/new: replace CLAUSE_TEMPLATES with trpc.nda.getClauses query
- BrandLogo component; remove inline gradient from login and home
- proxy.ts: route protection via withAuth (Next.js 16 convention)
- staleTime: 60_000 on QueryClient
- NEXTAUTH_SECRET guard at boot
- Remove default Next.js starter SVGs from public/

* feat(ui): brand redesign — splash sequence, profile select, login restyling

- Splash: motion SVG → black → logo fade-in/scale; tap or 3s auto-navigate
- BrandLogo: per-letter brand colors, withIcon prop (icon-logo.svg)
- Rename iconLogo.svg → icon-logo.svg (kebab-case convention)
- Button: rounded-full pill shape globally
- Login: SPID/CIE pill buttons with green border, privacy links highlighted, fade-out on success
- Profile select: vertical cards with brand copy, info modal (Dialog) per profile type
- Add shadcn Dialog component
- Add prisma initial migration

* fix: security hardening — rate limiting, OTP, password denylist, tRPC session fix

* fix: resolve Copilot review — tab filtering, NDA guard, key prop, rename step, remove rate limiter; add MVP philosophy to AGENTS

* Update src/app/page.tsx

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* ci: add GitHub Actions workflows and disable Vercel auto-deploy

* ci: fetch all secrets from Doppler, remove direct GitHub secret refs

* ci: fix doppler action tag to v1.3.1

* ci: retrigger deploy preview

* ci: fix release trigger branch master

* ci: fix version script — handle no existing tags

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: mvp-creandom
repository.description: A B2B/B2C platform for Intellectual Property (IP) protection and NDA signing.

- Accordion, Badge, Button, Card, Checkbox, Input, Label, Separator, Tabs

* feat(auth): implement multi-step signup and login flow

- Splash page with rainbow gradient logo + auto-redirect
- Login page: email/password + SPID/CIE layout buttons (disabled)
- Profile selection: Creativo (yellow) / Azienda (blue) cards

- Tabs (Tutti/Inviati/Non inviati) and FAB button

- Multi-stage build: deps → build (prisma generate) → production runner
- docker-compose.yml: PostgreSQL 16 + app with health checks
- .dockerignore for optimized build context

- NdaStatus enum in schema; add recipientId index

feat(schemas): define task import Zod schemas (T112)

Add ImportedTaskSchema, ImportManifestSchema, ParseWarningSchema, and
ParseWarningSeveritySchema to @factory/schemas for the task import
pipeline. Add missing EstimatedSizeSchema to shared.ts.

- ImportedTaskSchema: title + taskType required, priority defaults to
  "medium", optional fields align with CreateTaskDto
- ImportManifestSchema: top-level import result with tasks, warnings,
  and optional project/repo discovery fields
- ParseWarningSchema: structured parser diagnostics with severity levels
- 64 comprehensive tests covering acceptance, rejection, defaults,
  boundary cases, and all enum values

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(application): implement WorkerDispatchService

Add WorkerDispatchService that claims WORKER_DISPATCH jobs from the queue,
resolves spawn context via WorkerDispatchContextPort, and delegates to
WorkerSupervisorService.spawnWorker(). Follows the existing job-processing
pattern (claim → process → complete/fail) but is async and non-self-
rescheduling since dispatch jobs are created on-demand by the scheduler.

New files:
- ports/worker-dispatch.ports.ts — port interfaces and context types
- services/worker-dispatch.service.ts — service factory and implementation
- services/worker-dispatch.service.test.ts — 11 unit tests

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

path — task creation during init uses the import pipeline instead.

makes the public package interface cleaner; more than just polish.

fix: add @Inject() to all controllers/services for tsx compatibility

Extends the previous EventsModule fix to all controllers and services.
Without explicit @Inject() decorators, tsx/esbuild cannot resolve
constructor parameters by type, causing undefined service injections
and 500 errors on all API endpoints.

Also fixes the Vite dev proxy to rewrite /api prefix before forwarding
to the control plane, which serves routes without the /api prefix.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: add explicit @Inject() to EventsModule services for tsx compatibility

tsx (esbuild) does not support emitDecoratorMetadata, so NestJS cannot
resolve constructor parameters by type alone. Services using explicit
@Inject(TOKEN) worked, but EventsModule services relying on implicit
type-based resolution for ModuleRef received undefined, crashing
QueueWorkerEventsService.onModuleInit on startup.

Add @Inject() to all constructor parameters in:
- QueueWorkerEventsService (EventBroadcasterService, ModuleRef)
- DomainEventBroadcasterAdapter (EventBroadcasterService, ModuleRef)
- EventBroadcasterService (EventsGateway)

commit.message:
feat(matter): resolve SBMD endpoints by device type matching (#174)

The original method used to locate the Matter device endpoint to use for
a resource originated from the method used by Zigbee. Zigbee doesn't
have the device types and parts list attributes which are much better
suited to locate endpoints hosting desired functionality. Our drivers
are for specific device types (on/off light, dimmable light, etc). This
maps directly to the device types attribute on Matter endpoints and is
more reliable than just looking for an endpoint with a target cluster as
before.

- Add endpoint map (sbmdEndpointMap) to MatterDevice, built during
AddDevice() by matching device type lists against driver's
matterMeta.deviceTypes
- Add ResolveEndpointMap() and GetEndpointForSbmdIndex() methods
- Update BindResourceReadInfo, BindWriteInfo, BindExecuteInfo, and
BindResourceEventInfo to accept optional sbmdEndpointIndex parameter
- Pre-resolve Matter endpoint IDs at bind time; device-level resources
fall back to GetEndpointForCluster()
- Store resolvedEndpointId on write/execute bindings for use at
invocation time
- Update SpecBasedMatterDeviceDriver to pass endpoint index for
endpoint-level resources and std::nullopt for device-level resources
- Add MatterDeviceEndpointMapTest with 27 tests covering endpoint map
resolution, index lookup, and all four binding methods
- Add device-type-endpoint-resolution spec to openspec/specs
- Archive endpoints-from-device-types change

Refs: BARTON-358

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: BartonCore
repository.description: Barton is a functional IoT contribution with Matter and Zigbee device support included

commit.message:
Implement agentic multi-tool AI system with file attachments

- chaosgpt-zeta.html: Add agentic CSS (agent panel, download card, attachment
  area, EXIF table, entropy meter, file type badge styles)
- chaosgpt-zeta.html: New footer with attachment area div, paperclip button,
  and hidden file input supporting image/audio/video/code/binary files
- chaosgpt-zeta.html: Add attachedFiles state variable; modify sendMessage to
  include attachments + agentic flag; clear attachments after send
- chaosgpt-zeta.html: Hook into streaming path to auto-dispatch tool_call
  blocks parsed from AI responses via processAgentResponse()
- chaosgpt-zeta.html: Full agentic tool engine script block with:
